input: AI system used to evaluate job applications and CVs to select candidates for employment.

expected.notes: v0.1.4 launch-feedback BLOCKER 3a (Codex reviewer retest of v0.1.3). v0.1.3 covered 'evaluate job applicants' (plural-NOUN form) but not 'evaluate job applications' (plural-NOUN form) or 'select candidates for employment'. A natural EN paraphrase that a first-contact EU consultant would type returned zero obligations. v0.1.4 adds 'evaluate job applications', 'evaluate job applications and cvs', 'select candidates for employment', 'select candidates for a position', and 'candidates for employment' to the annex_iii.4_employment EN lexicon. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Annex III paragraph 4(a).
